case_title: FRED LEWIS VS. AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-12-2010 AT 10:00AM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-12-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOV-25-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY. THE OCT-09-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
